query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Multiple overlapping hands holding a Canon camera, with fingers visible on the body and lens, creating a layered effect of repeated gestures and camera equipment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Multiple overlapping, heavily motion-blurred hands in frantic movement grasping a Canon camera, with extreme smearing that dissolves all fine detail into streaks of skin tone and gray, creating an unsettling sense of anxious, repetitive energy and psychological distress as the subject appears overwhelmed by the act of photography itself.
